findings.description: User input used in file path without validation
User input used in open() without path validation

cases.note: Validates path with allowlist - must NOT trigger

findings.description: open() called with os.path.join(base_dir, user_input) without realpath normalization; ../../../etc/passwd traversal possible
res.sendFile() called with path constructed from unvalidated query parameter
ZIP member filename used directly in open() without checking for directory traversal sequences (zip-slip)

cases.note: Uses os.path.realpath() and verifies resolved path starts with BASE_DIR before opening - must NOT trigger
Uses path.resolve() and verifies result starts with ASSETS_DIR + path.sep before serving - must NOT trigger
